title: Creating a Business Executive Persona
scenario: Design a simple persona for a business executive. The persona should include the executive's age, job title, and management style. Use a formal tone and include the executive's name and age.
constraints: Must include the executive's name and age

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the description includes the executive's name and age, and uses a formal tone.
Check if the description includes the required information (job title, management style).
Check if the description is clear and easy to understand.
